ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NBA team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the NBA team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference in which the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team is placed */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of NBA championships won */,
  "coaches" TEXT /* JSON array of coaches and their tenures */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* JSON array of team colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game took place */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people in attendance */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game is part of */,
  "game_quarters" TEXT /* JSON array of quarter scores */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Final') */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went to overtime */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive efficiency */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive efficiency */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game (possessions per 48 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the NBA */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Player's biography */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* JSON array of player's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player Efficiency Rating (PER) */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win Shares */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus/Minus rating */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* Fantasy position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "venue_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the venue's photo */,
  "venue_social_media" TEXT /* JSON array of venue's social media links */,
  "venue_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's attendance */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of people in attendance */,
  "ticket_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from ticket sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "rehab_progress" TEXT /* JSON array of rehab progress updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount for the season */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Bonus amount for the season */,
  "performance_clauses" TEXT /* JSON array of performance clauses */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "option_years" TEXT /* JSON array of option years */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* JSON array of contract incentives */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
